summary: Approved (HUMAN_CONFIRMED, CURRENT): primary goal is enzyme activity prediction; explicit non-goal: protein structure generation (ART-CHARTER). Dataset: EnzymeBench v3, snapshot EBV3-7A91 (ART-DATA). Primary metric: macro AUROC; statistical unit: protein family (ART-METRIC). Formal seeds: 7, 21, 42 (ART-SEEDS). Baseline: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee (ART-BASELINE). GPU budget: 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protected path: data/raw; stop condition: budget exhausted or more than 2 NaN failures (ART-GOVERNANCE). Rejected alternatives: none recorded.
